AUTH-1.description: Two auth runs 90 min apart — zero 401 loops, full file listings both times

AUTH-2.description: All tokens stored server-side; no accessToken/refreshToken in any client-visible API response

AUTH-3.description: HttpOnly cookies only; localStorage contains no token data

AUTH-4.description: Singleton refresh promise — concurrent 401s resolve to a single refresh, never multiple

MODAL-1.description: All 9 Connect buttons open correct modal with correct form (automated Playwright)

UUID-1.description: Zero UUID-named folders in any connected provider after clean run

SYNC-1.description: Connections page = Sidebar — identical on 10 consecutive loads

UPLOAD-1.description: File upload produces visible feedback (success + failure); list refreshes; zero silent outcomes

PREVIEW-1.description: Supported types open preview panel; unsupported show Download CTA; toast bottom-right only

ACTIONS-1.description: Right-click menu = three-dot menu exactly; multi-select toolbar on ≥2 selections only

NAV-1.description: Exactly 6 nav items; Connections is sole source of truth; no orphaned routes

RESP-1.description: All core views render at 375px — no horizontal scroll

2FA-1.description: 2FA enable/use/disable full cycle passes; backup codes work; share links blocked without 2FA

TRANSFER-1.description: 1GB transfer with mid-transfer network drop resumes from last chunk, not from 0

ZERODISK-1.description: No file bytes written to server disk during cross-provider transfer (instrumented)

SSE-1.description: BullMQ worker progress reaches SSE client via Redis pub/sub — works across multiple Node instances

SHARE-1.description: Share link: create/access/expire/revoke all work; abuse controls enforced

VAULT-1.description: Vault hides content from All Files + Search; requires PIN; auto-locks; 2FA prerequisite enforced

SCHED-1.description: Scheduled job runs with browser closed; produces job history log

SEARCH-1.description: Cross-provider search returns results within 3s for ≤10k files; no persistent server-side index

SEC-1.description: VPS/WebDAV credentials never in API response after save; provider secrets never in browser

QUOTA-1.description: Provider quota surfaces emit configurable 80% and 95% threshold alerts through in-app and email notifications

RIMPORT-1.description: Remote URL imports stream directly into the selected provider without buffering the full file on the CacheFlow server

LOGS-1.description: Persistent terminal view renders real-time BullMQ and worker events over SSE with zero polling

SCHED-2.description: Recurring user-scoped backup jobs run with browser closed and expose reliable execution history

THROTTLE-1.description: User-controlled bandwidth caps persist per session and apply to future transfers

MEDIA-1.description: HTTP range requests support seekable media playback without a full file download

STREAM-1.description: Long-lived media streams remain stable without disk buffering or unbounded memory growth

VERSION-1.description: Overwrite and delete flows create snapshots that users can browse and restore

TRASH-1.description: Per-user trash supports restore and permanent delete with retention controls

KEYS-1.description: Dedicated VPS/SFTP key management supports create, rotate, and test flows with encrypted-at-rest material

NODE-1.description: VPS bridge supports custom ports and configurable keep-alive behavior for strict environments

HOLD-UI-2026-03-02.description: Phase 1 UI stabilization tasks block non-UI feature work until complete

QA-1.description: E2E preflight validates API readiness and watcher-driven unblock flow for Playwright execution
